LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. THE COURT INSTRUCTS DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH CITES THE RELEVANT AUTHORITIES UNDER THE CODE INCLUDING THE RELEVANT AUTHORITIES CITED IN THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING, AND WHICH STATES THAT THE CITY DID NOT HAVE A DUTY TO ACCOMODATE BEYOND THE 90-DAY TIME PERIOD. THE COURT INSTRUCTS DEFENSE COUNSEL TO SERVE THE OTHER SIDE WITH THE PROPOSED ORDER AND E-MAIL THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT AS A WORD DOCUMENT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO, CSR#8600, E-MAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIDSON, EVELYN TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Unredacted Records Received By Plaintiff Pursuant To Subpoena, Or, In The Alternative, To Compel Subpoena Service To Deliver Unredacted Documents Received Under Subpoena
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Unredacted Records Received By Plaintiff Pursuant To Subpoena, Or, In The Alternative, To Compel Subpoena Service To Deliver Unredacted Documents Received Under Subpoena.

Off calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. DEAN ROYER, ESQ. of Law Office of Dean Royer (Tel: 415-795-1475) appearing for the plaintiff;
Deputy City Attorney ERIN KUKA of the Office of the City Attorney of the City and County of San Francisco (Tel: 415-554-4229) appearing for the defendant City and County of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is granted.

The Court instructs defense counsel to prepare a proposed order which cites the relevant authorities under the Code including the relevant authorities cited in the Court's tentative ruling, and which states that the City did not have a duty to accomodate beyond the 90-day time period. The Court instructs defense counsel to serve the other side with the proposed order and e-mail the proposed order to the Court as a Word document.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Unredacted Records Received By Plaintiff Pursuant To Subpoena, Or, In The Alternative, To Compel Subpoena Service To Deliver Unredacted Documents Received Under Subpoena
